title: The Smell of Fresh Bread
content: Every morning on his way to work, Marcus passed the same small bakery near the corner of his street. Long before sunrise, the smell of fresh bread already filled the cold morning air. No matter how stressful life became, that simple detail always slowed his thoughts for a moment. Some mornings he stopped to buy coffee and pastries, listening quietly to the familiar sounds of bakers working behind the counter. Other days he simply continued walking while carrying the comforting smell with him toward another exhausting workday. Over time, Marcus realized small routines like that quietly shaped emotional memories far more deeply than most extraordinary events ever could.
